fixture: create_insert_select

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE widgets (id INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets VALUES (1)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM widgets
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1
